Name: Carrie Placer Mine Plan of Operations
nepa_location_text__c: T. 6 S., R. 5 W., Section 28, Jordan Creek watershed, Owyhee County, Idaho
nepa_project_description__c: Placer gold mining Plan of Operations on 15 acres of BLM-administered land in T. 6 S. R. 5 W. Section 28 Owyhee County Idaho. Adjacent to Jordan Creek approximately 9 miles southeast of Jordan Valley Oregon. 1.7-mile two-track access road with two locked gates. Proposed 5-10 year operation with seasonal mining window March 1 through November 30.
